query: UPDATE products SET colors = NULL WHERE colors IS NOT NULL AND (colors NOT LIKE '%]' OR colors NOT LIKE '%}'); UPDATE products SET sizes = NULL WHERE sizes IS NOT NULL AND (sizes NOT LIKE '%]' OR sizes NOT LIKE '%}');
